# Refreshing the AIAYN golden IR

The fixture's `paper-content.md` and `figures/` are the **Docling extraction** of
*Attention Is All You Need* (arXiv 1706.03762). They are regenerated by this
procedure, never hand-edited. **The PDF is never committed** — it is fetched to a
gitignored location and stays there.

## Prerequisites

- `uv` on PATH.
- Network access (to fetch the PDF from arXiv).

## Steps

1. **Fetch the PDF to the gitignored `papers/` dir** (root `.gitignore` ignores
   `*.pdf`):

   ```bash
   curl -L -o papers/aiayn-1706.03762.pdf https://arxiv.org/pdf/1706.03762
   ```

2. **Run Docling** via the skill's deterministic frontend (installs the ingest
   extra into the paper2beamer venv on first run):

   ```bash
   cd paper2beamer
   uv sync --group ingest
   uv run python scripts/frontend_docling.py \
     ../papers/aiayn-1706.03762.pdf \
     --out /tmp/aiayn-ingest
   cd ..
   ```

   This produces `/tmp/aiayn-ingest/paper-content.md` and
   `/tmp/aiayn-ingest/figures/`.

3. **Copy the text + figures into the fixture** (overwriting the old golden IR):

   ```bash
   cp /tmp/aiayn-ingest/paper-content.md eval/fixtures/aiayn/paper-content.md
   rm -rf eval/fixtures/aiayn/figures
   cp -r /tmp/aiayn-ingest/figures eval/fixtures/aiayn/figures
   ```

4. **Sanity-check and commit** the text + PNGs only (the PDF stays out of git):

   ```bash
   git status eval/fixtures/aiayn   # should show paper-content.md + figures/*.png
   git add eval/fixtures/aiayn/paper-content.md eval/fixtures/aiayn/figures
   ```

> If Docling emits figures in a format other than PNG, add an allowlist line for
> that extension in the root `.gitignore` next to the existing
> `!eval/fixtures/**/figures/*.png` rule.
